properties.name: Bain Center 50+ Center
properties.hours: Monday through Thursday: 8:30 a.m. to 7:30 p.m. Friday: 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Saturday: 8:30 a.m. to noon Closed: New Year's Day, Martin Luther King, Jr. Day, President's Day, Good Friday, Memorial Day, Juneteenth National Freedom Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Indigenous People's Day, Veterans Day, Thanksgiving Holiday (Thursday and Friday), and Christmas Day Note: If a holiday falls on a Saturday, County offices, including 50+ centers are closed the day before, i.e., Friday, and if a holiday falls on a Sunday, the County will observe the holiday the following day, i.e., Monday
